{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603230243029001274B021679C1155E\"}"},"total":2280},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7449207599853159192","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看名字还以为又是那种起步屌丝，然后就虎躯一震再震，各种富家小姐姐，女总裁轮番上阵的小说，没想到意外的写的不错，平诉中娓娓道来，值得一看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734410818,"group_id":"7439718750128966681","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"莫言大道无情，大道五十，天衍四九，遁去一，以为众生一线生机。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N10FBTJESAyyBRL8Ws88phk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2005c3ef9b6440debdf29ee692e453b1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776789438\u0026x-signature=58TVtuQOokcf0Eu%2F9XOAT2jfID0%3D","user_id":"9219429640707","user_name":"周天罗经"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"9219429640707","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7439718750128966681","book_info":{"abstract":"从秦朝穿越到2024，有空间，有功法，苟在首都送外卖！身份普通，职业更是普通，每天都普普通通，苟着苟着就成了大佬，读起来不仅真实，而且爆爽！（所有故事都是杜撰，如有雷同，纯属巧合。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/520e82986e0a399f90b686cb12390cbf","author":"瞎之大义","author_id":"","book_id":"7439718750128966681","book_name":"穿越首都送外卖","book_short_name":"苟在京城修仙","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#506060","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":44,\"name\":\"空间\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44\u0026name=空间\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":75,\"name\":\"外卖\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=75\u0026name=外卖\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":520,\"name\":\"大佬\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520\u0026name=大佬\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7439720174523007513","read_count":"40567","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1504404"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"717","tags":"都市修真,都市,穿越,空间,外卖,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/p2o60efb09f1f4fc0511e8f0bf49d7d1fe5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779388982\u0026x-signature=9lu4v%2FQ402LNwf9t3h02OGMJUNg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"641714180069629","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"53"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603230243029001274B021679C1155E\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":61,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7007,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":95288},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1735831578,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7457902099340608281","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看标题提不起什么兴趣，但是内容可是很吸引人的，8.3的评分太低了，至少9分以上，小说最吸引人的地方就在于作者本身当过外卖员，也许现在还在当，几乎所有的事全是真实发生过的，很新鲜，很有乐趣，也能让很多人共鸣，这种碎片化的故事在配合男主还债的主线。和朋友田小牛开饭店的主线，为女儿治病的主线。与警察的主线。甚至还有修仙的主线，感觉特别精彩，欲罢不能。这是一个宝藏作者。可惜小说只有一本。不够看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736433124,"group_id":"7439718750128966681","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwLKoBVpTxmb2a0WOQ7UVmM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"52368603695","user_name":"爱吃发丝百叶的刘供奉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52368603695","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1704211744,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7439718750128966681","book_info":{"abstract":"从秦朝穿越到2024，有空间，有功法，苟在首都送外卖！身份普通，职业更是普通，每天都普普通通，苟着苟着就成了大佬，读起来不仅真实，而且爆爽！（所有故事都是杜撰，如有雷同，纯属巧合。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/520e82986e0a399f90b686cb12390cbf","author":"瞎之大义","author_id":"","book_id":"7439718750128966681","book_name":"穿越首都送外卖","book_short_name":"苟在京城修仙","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#506060","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都
